pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly assigns ATTACKER_IP="192.168.50.44" and uses it to generate the malicious apache log entries.
task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh all explicitly define TARGET_FILE as "/var/ossec/logs/forensic_import.log".
setup_task.sh explicitly writes the synthetic apache log to "/home/ga/evidence/old_apache.log".
verifier.py checks if "sql_injection" is in the alert groups for the generated attacks.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated apache log data containing explicit SQL injection attacks originating from the IP 192.168.50.44. The data is written to /home/ga/evidence/old_apache.log and is expected to be ingested into Wazuh at /var/ossec/logs/forensic_import.log. The alerts triggered by the synthetic attacks are expected to have the sql_injection rule group.
